title: angelica commutata
intro: Angelica commutata, also known as gumbo root or American angelica, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Angelica commutata is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its use in treating menstrual cramps, arthritis, and skin conditions. Angelica commutata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy in folk medicine.
